reviews.review_text: Really beautiful staff xo

This is a great holiday park 5 mins out of Tumut. The rooms are very clean and comfortable. There is a fantastic bbq area that has a huge bbq, pizza oven, microwave, kettle, air fryer, tv, sandwiche press and all required utensils. The two guys that run the park are awesome guys and are always happy to help and very friendly. I highly recommend this place for short or long term stays

We had a lovely spot with great views. Staff were very nice. Camp kitchen had good facilities like toaster and even an airfryer. Unfortunately the 2 out 3 nights we stayed were pretty noisy with a group of campers playing really loud music until late into night. We did not ask them to turn it down as they were also drunk. Therefore not ideal if looking for somewhere to relax. For this reason we would probably not stay again.
Bloody brilliant and accepts dogs!

We had a powered caravan site. The guy's in the office were just amazing. Great value for money. Toilets and showers really clean. The pool was the best bonus on a hot day. Easy access to town and blowering dam. Highly recommend this place.

My husband, myself and our two dogs were just looking for a chilled out and relaxed few days. We took our motorhome and it didn’t disappoint. The views were so breathtaking. The pool is beautiful. The owners went out of their way to make sure we felt welcome. Sure, the park could use a massive overhaul but I know they are in the process of making this happen. Would I stay there again? 100%

Thanks Darryl & Brett. Very accommodating and helpful. We had to bring our booking forward as we were near the Vic fires at Jingelic, this was no issue, also then had to extend our stay, which also was not issue.  Grass was not very green, but I'm sure this will improve when the weather is nicer.  Pool was great & will be even better soon when the planned work is carried out.  We had a great stay & should we ever be back in the area will stay again.  Thanks again Darryl & Brett and good luck with the future plans for the park.
Great place couldn't ask for more helpful friendly staff. Would definitely recommend this place as a must stop.

We drove our camper in to a beautifully kept relatively flat grass area. Of course in this farming area you get flies at times, but when the breeze blows they go away. The river view and walks are amazing, as well as the bird watching in the river swamp areas. No mozzies either. And we faced a farm paddock with roaming cattle. Just a lovely beautiful place. Oh, and I'm told the fishing goes off in fishing season in the nearby Tumut river.

Awesome service and experience.
Darrel was awesome guy to deal with .
Great location if you want to fish.  go in the right season .you can walk to the river when it's not raining.
Perfect little haven in Tumut. Reasonably priced, nice amenities inc pizza oven. Friendly staff would definitely recommend and stay here again! :)
Stayed there for 3 days, and it was beautiful . The guy at the reception desk was very welcoming and helpful. Thank you for the one more good memories

I am writing this review to express my gratitude for the wonderful experience my family and I had during our recent stay at the Tumut Valley Holiday Park. ||||The staff demonstrated exceptional service, showcasing an extensive knowledge of the local area and revealing some hidden gems that the visitor center had overlooked. We particularly enjoyed our stay at site 33 in the lower park, which offered breathtaking views of the paddocks, mountains, and river. The children relished the expansive open space as well as the pool.||||I was impressed with the cleanliness of the restrooms, which were maintained impeccably with cleaning three times a day during our visit. Furthermore, a special mention must go to Darrel, the manager, who graciously set up a fire pit on our last night. Gathering around it with family under the stars was a truly unforgettable experience, made even more memorable when Darrel informed us about the upcoming Starlink train—a sight I will cherish for a lifetime.||||We have already booked our next stay and eagerly await our return. Thank you once again to your entire team for creating such memorable moments.
Travelling with caravan, great little park

Lost my phone while fishing down the back of the park and the helpful staff took the time to help me find it. Recommend these guys and cant thank them enough
It's a beautiful place to stay , right on the river. Cant beat the friendly service . 5 stars from me

Not fancy, but clean, convenient, and budget-friendly with nice staff! We stayed in cabin 9, and it was quiet and perfect for what we needed: a safe, clean, quiet place to sleep after a day of exploring the region.

Quiet park with great views if you are in the back left corner of the park. Only consider if you have your own bathroom as theirs are dirty and full of mosquitos. Visit Yarrangobilly caves from here (about an hours drive 77km)

Before I go on this rant, I would like to add that the park is currently closed and extensive renovations are planned.
The staff were really friendly to boot.
I have struggled with this review, and decided to post it after reading other recent reviews, and just wondered why they posted what they did given the state of the toilet block.

Regardless of what you plan to do with a business, your first priority should be health, safety and cleanliness.
This is a huge fail, and one can only hope that after the extensive renovation's and the culling of permanent guests this park will be as great as its potential.
The pool, camp kitchen and some parts of the grounds and other amenities were spot on, and indicated a real effort was being made.
A  first in my experience was a free washing machine, kudos.

We had great views both sides. Front facing onto the river with cattle and ducks back of us had hills where the sunset. Place will be great when finished the pool was clean and refreshing. Owners lovely. Office Closed between 1 and 2 pm. Would stay again.

We are just staying here and after trying a few places, we’re wanting to support this place 😌.

Kitchen is AWESOME, clean and new and even a pizza oven! With a stone plate. A natural river nearby for swimming, a pool to enjoy the warm weather and working wifi.

Just come and enjoy yourself!!

Wonderful stop arounded by mountains.
Nice walk to the river.
Great coffee
Needs a good disability toilet and shower.
The managers are wonderful
Nice location and staff are friendly, helpful, and cooperative.

The park is a quiet well kept lovely place.
There are many birds and wildlife that you see. There is a great place to walk along the river. The staff are wonderful very helpful, friendly and polite. The swimming pool is greatly appreciated in the summer time a great place to hang out. There are nice BBQ areas clean with plenty of area to bbq with my family.

Exceptionally poor facility, not suitable unless expectations are low. Shower taps faulty leads to scalding, do not let child unsupervised in shower. Caravan parking area rough requiring a lot of adjustment to get settled. Demountable showers and toilets in abominable condition. Man of average height cannot reach urinal. Toilets Also smelly and not cleaned properly. Refer to picture of shower. Main showers also terrible, not designed in a way to change easily without soiling or wetting clothes. Isolated area. It’s a farm block pretending to be a tourist park. Would not recommend. Price was comparatively high.

What a peaceful park. So beautiful. Surrounded by farm land (couple of cows and horses) which made the experience so much more special. All guests were friendly and welcoming.

The guy in the office was so helpful, his local knowledge helped me as a solo traveller.

I would recommend anyone to stay here and travel the area.

I will definitely be back

We had the best Easter here. Staff are super friendly and helpful, location is awesome with a short walk to the river and not far from Tumut town. Thoroughly recommend this Holiday Park who are slowly upgrading this venue.

A great place to stay. The managers have put a lot of work into the place over the last couple of years and the place just keeps getting better.
The cabins are a bit old but sound. They will be getting upgraded pretty soon.
Toilet and shower block for men is also a bit rundown.
Staff are very responsive to communication and willing to help out as much as they can
Nice little van park close to town. Big grassy sites, reasonably priced sites and able to walk to the river for a brief swim, very cold water.

A lovely quiet caravan park with views to the mountains. The powered caravan sites are being upgraded and the grass is growing nicely.
The shower and toilet block could do with some minor repairs and a good deep clean.
Priced at $25 per night it is good value for peace and quiet and the views.

We stayed in one of the motel rooms. Older style but new carpet, comfortable bed & very nice linen & towels. Very clean & tidy. Easy 5kms drive out of town. The 2 guys that run this park are locals & have a great knowledge of the area. Best part of this park is the wonderful paddock behind with a path that leads to the river where you can fish & swim. This is a definite as a location for a break. Highly recommened
Very good and friendly staff

Beautifully situated  - river frontage, easy walk into town. Nature walks.|Men's shower block has shower roses that are difficult to manage ... too hot, too cold, too hot ....|Key entry for shower/toilet.|Average wifi.|Noise from logging trucks is ongoing.

Nothing extraordinary to comment on, place was clean, quiet, nearby a river for fishing, pool, close enough to Tumut for convenience, but further enough away for seclusion. All in all a good experience and would be happy to return.
Great little park, friendly and welcoming staff, nice pool area ,clean amenities put on a great night for New years.
Currently renovating this park to bring it up to a good standard.  Friendly staff

Fantastic place to have a good rest!!
Friendly staff!!
100% recommended!!
